title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

heroTitle.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

heroSubtitle.text: Vinakili mapishi halisi kutoka jikoni za duniani kote
heroSubtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

featuredTitle.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

cookingTime.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

ramenName.description: Jina la mapishi ya Tonkotsu Ramen.

ramenDescription.text: Mchuzi tajiri wa mfupa wa nguruwe wenye chashu laini, yai lililopikwa kwa upole, na tambi safi.
ramenDescription.description: Maelezo ya mapishi ya Tonkotsu Ramen.

margheritaName.description: Jina la mapishi ya Piza ya Margherita.

margheritaDescription.text: Piza ya Neapolitan ya jadi yenye nyanya za San Marzano, mozzarella safi, na basil.
margheritaDescription.description: Maelezo ya mapishi ya Piza ya Margherita.

tacosName.description: Jina la mapishi ya Tacos al Pastor.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos za nguruwe zilizochochewa na nanasi, cilantro, na kitunguu kwenye tortillas za mahindi.
tacosDescription.description: Maelezo ya mapishi ya Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenName.description: Jina la mapishi ya Kuku wa Siagi.

butterChickenDescription.text: Kuku laini katika mchuzi wa nyanya na siagi wenye viungo vyenye harufu nzuri.
butterChickenDescription.description: Maelezo ya mapishi ya Kuku wa Siagi.

padThaiName.description: Jina la mapishi ya Pad Thai.

padThaiDescription.text: Tambi za mchele zilizokaangwa na kamba, tofu, karanga, na mchuzi wa tamarind.
padThaiDescription.description: Maelezo ya mapishi ya Pad Thai.

crepesName.description: Jina la mapishi ya Crepes za Kifaransa.

crepesDescription.text: Crepes nyembamba, nyororo zilizojaa Nutella, jordgubbar safi, na krimu iliyopigwa.
crepesDescription.description: Maelezo ya mapishi ya Crepes za Kifaransa.

label.description: Accessible label for the language switcher dropdown in the header.

en.description: English language option in the locale switcher.

ja.description: Japanese language option in the locale switcher.

es.description: Spanish language option in the locale switcher.
